856 ROUTE_PRVDR_PAPER_CD ROUTE_PRVDR_PAPER_CD A2122D Provider Trans - Paper-based CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the subsequent provider was paper-based (e.g., fax, copies, printouts). 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
